goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should be in the 'north' and should 'include free parking'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 12:45' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should depart from 'ely'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the north and should include free parking
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 12:45 and should go to cambridge
The train should leave on tuesday and should depart from ely
Make sure you get departure time and price
